appliedUpdates.description: Added patterns for fast CLI output using io::BufWriter, rayon collect order preservation, and avoiding unnecessary allocations in read-only paths.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the skill to allow sequential `WalkBuilder::build()` for directory traversal when benchmarking indicates it is faster than `ignore::WalkParallel` on flat corpora.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature 'parallel-walk-and-prefilter' correctly used sequential traversal for better performance as permitted by the instructions, but this deviated from the rigid requirement in the rust-worker skill.

rejectedObservations.observation: Feature was marked completed without a recorded worker session ID, suggesting it was executed directly by orchestrator or a human developer.
rejectedObservations.reason: Not actionable; just an observation about how the feature was completed.
